nasb.text: They struck down at that time about ten thousand Moabites, all robust and valiant men; and no one escaped.

esv.text: And they killed at that time about 10,000 of the Moabites, all strong, able-bodied men; not a man escaped.

cnv.text: 那時他們擊殺了約有一萬摩押人，都是強壯的、勇猛的人，沒有一人逃脫。

ccb.text: 当时他们杀了约一万名强悍善战的摩押勇士，没有一人逃脱。
